spec_match.rationale: Composes window shape from rectangles — the core shape-building primitive from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls for adding/removing/positioning rectangles with live preview.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises a rectangle composer; delivers a working builder.

edge_cases.rationale: Could show overlapping rectangles or zero-size edge cases.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested: rectangle composition works. No console errors.
